title: Atoz London Taxi & Bus Pull Back
features: London Big Red Double Decker Bus and Black Taxi Models - not to scale
description: Product Description London Big red double Decker bus and black taxi not to scale models made of die-cast metal - licensed and approved by the motor manufacturer. Die cast metal replicas with some plastic parts. Superb interior and extreme detail, opening doors with pull back & go action Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years. Small parts, chocking hazard
